# Getting help

- **Bug reports** — [open a bug report](https://github.com/carrilloapps/hfo/issues/new?template=bug_report.yml)
- **Feature ideas** — [open a feature request](https://github.com/carrilloapps/hfo/issues/new?template=feature_request.yml)
- **Usage questions or discussions** — [GitHub Discussions](https://github.com/carrilloapps/hfo/discussions)
- **Security issues** — read [SECURITY.md](../SECURITY.md) first; do **not** open a public issue for vulnerabilities.

Before posting:

1. Search [existing issues](https://github.com/carrilloapps/hfo/issues?q=) and [discussions](https://github.com/carrilloapps/hfo/discussions).
2. Run `hfo --version` and include the output.
3. If the problem is install-related, include the output of `hfo --view` (it prints your OS, Node version, Ollama status, and hardware profile).

This is a small project maintained in spare time. Please keep reports kind and specific — see [CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md](../CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md).
